meaning: n.(戏剧、小说等的)情节主线,主要情节
examples: The plotline is similar to that of many other movies.
The absurd plotline also contributes to its humorous effect.
As in earlier novels, some of the tenderest scenes are tangential to the main plotline.
But the suggestion that Texas might break away has only recently become a common plotline.
Given the recent controversy over the baby-swap story, did Stella's child-abuse plotline spark any complaints?
